# PolyProPicks — LLM Discovery File
# https://polypropicks.com/llms.txt
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

## What is PolyProPicks?

PolyProPicks is a sports and prediction-market intelligence platform operated by Benefitpoint Inc.
It translates raw market data into signal cards with a position, Signal Confidence score, market evidence, and trust metrics.
PolyProPicks is not a sportsbook, betting operator, broker, exchange, financial adviser, or investment adviser.
We do not place bets, execute trades, custody user funds, or guarantee outcomes.

## Who is it for?

People who follow sports markets, prediction markets (Polymarket, Kalshi), and odds movement but want a faster way to understand what matters — without reading raw order books, fragmented signal channels, or noisy social posts.

## Key concepts

- Signal Confidence: a simplified score summarizing multiple market-intelligence factors (movement, liquidity, whale-flow proxies, data coverage). Not a win guarantee.
- Trust Metrics: supporting indicators (Smart Money, Whale vs Public, PreEventScore AI, odds quality). Not guarantees.
- Whale Flow / Smart Money: market-data interpretation signals (large trade proxies, concentrated activity). Not verified institutional or insider information.

## Pages

- / — Landing page
- /reconstruction — Alternative landing (A/B)
- /premium — Premium access (authenticated)
- /faq — Frequently asked questions
- /legal — Legal center (terms index, risk notices)
- /terms-of-use — Full Terms of Use
- /privacy-policy — Full Privacy Policy
- /sitemap.xml — Sitemap

## Contact

Benefitpoint Inc. — doing business as PolyProPicks
Email: Alex_ceo@polypropicks.com

## Disclaimer

Signals are probabilistic and informational only. Not betting, financial, legal, or investment advice.
Third-party market data may be delayed, incomplete, or inaccurate. Use at your own risk.
